exit(uint256).notice: Follower exits their position and withdraws

postBond(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Trader posts a bond to attract followers

slash(uint256,uint256).notice: Oracle triggers a slash when score drops below threshold

updateScore(uint256,uint256).notice: Oracle updates a trader's AI score
